name: EuiComboBox
description: Multi-select or single-select input with search and custom option support.

async.description: Updates the list of options asynchronously

compressed.description: When `true` creates a shorter height input

fullWidth.description: When `true` expands to the entire width available

isClearable.description: Shows a button that quickly clears any input

isLoading.description: Swaps the dropdown options for a loading spinner

onChange.description: Called every time the query in the combo box is parsed

onSearchChange.description: Called every time the text query in the search box is parsed

placeholder.description: Sets the placeholder of the input

rowHeight.description:
The height of each option in pixels. When using a custom render (`renderOption` prop) it's recommended to set it explicitly.
`auto` will disable virtualization, enabling text to wrap onto multiple lines.

singleSelection.description: When `true` only allows the user to select a single option. Set to `{ asPlainText: true }` to not render input selection as pills

isCaseSensitive.description: Whether to match options with case sensitivity.

prepend.description:
Creates an input group with element(s) coming before input. It won't show if `singleSelection` is set to `false`.
`string` | `ReactElement` or an array of these

append.description:
Creates an input group with element(s) coming after input. It won't show if `singleSelection` is set to `false`.
`string` | `ReactElement` or an array of these

delimiter.description: A special character to use as a value separator. Typically a comma `,`

autoFocus.description: Specifies that the input should have focus when the component loads

aria-label.description: Required when rendering without a visible label from [EuiFormRow](/#/forms/form-layouts).

aria-labelledby.description:
Reference ID of a text element containing the visible label for the combo box when not
supplied by `aria-label` or from [EuiFormRow](/#/forms/form-layouts).

truncationProps.description:
By default, EuiComboBox will truncate option labels at the end of
the string. You can use pass in a custom truncation configuration that
accepts any [EuiTextTruncate](/#/utilities/text-truncation) prop,
except for `text` and `children`.

Note: when searching, custom truncation props are ignored. The highlighted search
text will always take precedence.

inputPopoverProps.description:
Allows customizing the underlying EuiInputPopover component
(except for props that control state).

options.description: Array of EuiComboBoxOptionOption objects. See {@link EuiComboBoxOptionOption}

customOptionText.description:
Creates a custom text option. You can use `{searchValue}` inside your string to better customize your text.
It won't show if there's no onCreateOption.

renderOption.type: (option: EuiComboBoxOptionOption<T>, searchValue: string, OPTION_CONTENT_CLASSNAME: string) => ReactNode
